1.name: Marisol G.
1.text: Cheapest 2-liter in the neighborhood and always cold. I stop in every weekend.

1.name: Danny R.
1.text: Good price. Wish they stocked the mini cans too but the 2L is a great deal.

3.name: Coach Will
3.text: Grab a case of these for the team every Saturday. Best price around and they have all the flavors.

5.name: Jasmine T.
5.text: 99 cents?! Can't beat it. The honey green tea is my go-to after work.

5.name: Pete
5.text: Always in stock, always cheap. Exactly what a corner store should be.

5.name: Lucia M.
5.text: Love it. Sometimes the flavor I want is sold out but they restock fast.

6.name: Eddie V.
6.text: Real Jarritos, mandarin and tamarindo. Tastes like home. Great little spot.
